**VENDOR_ADDL** -> AR_TAX_TABLES (TAX_CODE->AUTH, TAX_CODE->ZONE); BIR_USER (BI_PO_RPT_ID -> REPORT_ID); COUNTRY_CODES (CTRY_CODE -> CODE); TAX_GROUP_RATE (TAX_CODE -> GRP_CD); VENDOR_MASTER (CUSTOMS_VENDOR->VENDOR, FREIGHT_VENDOR->VENDOR, VENDOR->VENDOR)

**VENDOR_CURR** -> COMPANY_CURRENCY (CURRENCY -> ISO_CODE); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR)

**VENDOR_ENCRYPT** -> USER_INFORMATION (LAST_CHG_BY -> GS_USER); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR_ID -> VENDOR)

**VENDOR_INTL** -> AP_CC_MAINT (CCARD_NAME -> CC_NAME); COMPANY_CURRENCY (DEFAULT_CURRENCY -> ISO_CODE); COMP_LANG (LANG_CD -> ISO_CODE); EXCHANGE_CURRENCY (ORIGIN_COUNTRY -> ISO_CODE)

**VENDOR_MASTER** -> BUYER_DESCRIPTOR (BUYER -> BUYER_CODE); GL_MASTER (NORMAL_GL_ACCOUNT -> GL_ACCOUNT)

**VENDOR_NT** -> VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR)

**VENDOR_PAY_TO** -> AP_SHIP_FOB (CODE_FOB -> CODE); AP_TERMS_INFO (PAYMENT_TERMS -> CODE); AP_VIA_SHIP (SHIP_VIA -> CODE); CUSTOMER_MASTER (NUMBER_CUSTOMER -> CUSTOMER); VEND_MSTR_ADDL (VENDOR -> VEND_NO)

**VENDOR_RFQ_TRANS** -> INVENTORY_MSTR (PART_NUMBER -> PART); INV_CROSS_REF (MFG_PART_NUMBER -> MFG_PART); UM_CODES (UNIT -> CODE); VENDOR_MASTER (VENDOR -> VENDOR); VEND_RFQ_LN_TEXT (LINE->LINE, NUM->NUMBER)
